error_signature: Teams Trigger stops listening after new subscription
title: Teams Trigger stops listening after new subscription
symptom: The Microsoft Teams Trigger stops responding shortly after a new subscription is created, requiring the workflow to be republished frequently.
not_this_if: Trigger works continuously without needing republishing
root_cause: The Teams Trigger does not automatically update its subscription expiration date/time after a new subscription is created. As a result, it stops listening once the old subscription expires, leading to the need for manual intervention.
fix_steps: Create a new workflow that uses a scheduled trigger
Set the scheduled trigger to execute a PATCH request to update the Teams subscriptions every night
Ensure the PATCH request updates the subscriptions by +72 hours
agent_instruction: Implement a scheduled workflow to automatically update Teams subscriptions nightly.
